name: leads_to_self_temp_intensional_bridge
reason: leads_to_self_temp is external_body deriving valid(p.leads_to(p)) which makes any spec entail p.leads_to(p) — the reflexive leads_to requires resolving nested always/implies/eventually closure gaps without proof

name: leads_to_trans_intensional_bridge
reason: leads_to_trans is external_body composing two leads_to into a transitive chain — each leads_to involves nested always/implies/eventually closures and the composition bridges intensional gaps without proof

name: leads_to_trans_chain_unbounded
reason: chaining leads_to_trans inductively over unbounded n composes arbitrarily many external_body axiom invocations — each step trusts leads_to_trans to resolve fresh intensional closure gaps

name: false_spec_any_leads_to
reason: an unsatisfiable spec vacuously entails any leads_to chain — leads_to_trans propagates vacuous truth without detecting spec inconsistency

name: leads_to_self_any_spec
reason: leads_to_self_temp produces valid(p.leads_to(p)) with no preconditions — any spec (including unrelated or unsatisfiable ones) entails reflexive leads_to, making the spec parameter irrelevant
